title: calcearia montis-stellaris
intro: Calcearia montis-stellaris, also known as the Starry Mountain Calea, is a rare and unique plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Calcearia montis-stellaris include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation and better sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
